achievements.name: Branching Out
achievements.description: Active across multiple Git weeks.

achievements.name: Branch Manager
achievements.description: Clean branch rhythm without much drift.

achievements.name: Push Comes To Shove
achievements.description: Code keeps shipping when it counts.

achievements.name: Clone Wars
achievements.description: Hands-on Git activity across the cycle.

achievements.name: Fork Lift
achievements.description: Week 08 fork check cleared.

achievements.name: Push Your Luck
achievements.description: Waited too long and drift started piling up.

achievements.name: Git Lost
achievements.description: Branch state drifted into the weeds.

achievements.name: Forking Around
achievements.description: Working off a fork instead of keeping it simple.

achievements.name: Staged Fright
achievements.description: Showed up everywhere except the commit history.

achievements.name: Pushin' Daisies
achievements.description: Branch went stale before the sync ever happened.

achievements.name: Card Shark
achievements.description: Consistently active on the board.

achievements.name: Card Carrying
achievements.description: Owns cards and follows through.

achievements.name: Move It Or Lose It
achievements.description: Actually moves work through the board.

achievements.name: Ctrl Alt Complete
achievements.description: Cards make it all the way to done.

achievements.name: Card Blanche
achievements.description: Looks completely in control of the board.

achievements.name: Board Silly
achievements.description: Lots of board motion without much closure.

achievements.name: Card Declined
achievements.description: Cards exist, but barely move.

achievements.name: No Parking
achievements.description: A card sat in one lane for way too long.

achievements.name: Board To Tears
achievements.description: Board movement slowed to a crawl.

achievements.name: Room and Board
achievements.description: A card basically moved in and never left.

achievements.name: Standup Guy
achievements.description: Dependable standup presence.

achievements.name: Talk To The Hand
achievements.description: Actually shows up with something to say.

achievements.name: Get Up Stand Up
achievements.description: Keeps reporting in and moving forward.

achievements.name: You Talkin' To Me?
achievements.description: Keeps the standup count rolling past the basics.

achievements.name: Stand and Deliver
achievements.description: Shows up reliably when a standup is due.

achievements.name: Pleading The 5th
achievements.description: No standup showed up at the first check.

achievements.name: Silent Treatment
achievements.description: Still no standups after a few checkpoints.

achievements.name: Ground Hog Day
achievements.description: Keeps posting the same update over and over.

achievements.name: Bueller?
achievements.description: Still nothing after multiple standup windows.

achievements.name: Silent But Deadly
achievements.description: Still no standups after the second checkpoint.

achievements.name: Talk To The Hand
achievements.description: Actually shows up with something to say.

achievements.name: Get Up Stand Up
achievements.description: Keeps reporting in and moving forward.

achievements.name: You Talkin' To Me?
achievements.description: Keeps the standup count rolling past the basics.

achievements.name: Stand and Deliver
achievements.description: Shows up reliably when a standup is due.

achievements.name: Pleading The 5th
achievements.description: No standup showed up at the first check.

achievements.name: Silent Treatment
achievements.description: Still no standups after a few checkpoints.

achievements.name: Ground Hog Day
achievements.description: Keeps posting the same update over and over.

achievements.name: Bueller?
achievements.description: Still nothing after multiple standup windows.

achievements.name: Silent But Deadly
achievements.description: Still no standups after the second checkpoint.

achievements.name: Branching Out
achievements.description: Active across multiple Git weeks.

achievements.name: Branch Manager
achievements.description: Clean branch rhythm without much drift.

achievements.name: Push Comes To Shove
achievements.description: Code keeps shipping when it counts.

achievements.name: Clone Wars
achievements.description: Hands-on Git activity across the cycle.

achievements.name: Fork Lift
achievements.description: Week 08 fork check cleared.

achievements.name: Push Your Luck
achievements.description: Waited too long and drift started piling up.

achievements.name: Git Lost
achievements.description: Branch state drifted into the weeds.

achievements.name: Forking Around
achievements.description: Working off a fork instead of keeping it simple.

achievements.name: Staged Fright
achievements.description: Showed up everywhere except the commit history.

achievements.name: Pushin' Daisies
achievements.description: Branch went stale before the sync ever happened.

achievements.name: Card Shark
achievements.description: Consistently active on the board.

achievements.name: Card Carrying
achievements.description: Owns cards and follows through.

achievements.name: Move It Or Lose It
achievements.description: Actually moves work through the board.

achievements.name: Ctrl Alt Complete
achievements.description: Cards make it all the way to done.

achievements.name: Card Blanche
achievements.description: Looks completely in control of the board.

achievements.name: Board Silly
achievements.description: Lots of board motion without much closure.

achievements.name: Card Declined
achievements.description: Cards exist, but barely move.

achievements.name: No Parking
achievements.description: A card sat in one lane for way too long.

achievements.name: Board To Tears
achievements.description: Board movement slowed to a crawl.

achievements.name: Room and Board
achievements.description: A card basically moved in and never left.
